## Summary
- [ ] Briefly describe what changed.
- [ ] Link issue/task (if available).

## VLCP PR Checklist (Required)
- [ ] I did **not** rename folders.
- [ ] I did **not** restructure routes.
- [ ] I did **not** replace Expo Router.
- [ ] I did **not** add a new UI framework (Tailwind/NativeWind/UI kits).
- [ ] I touched only files necessary for this task.
- [ ] I did not include cleanup-only or formatting-only changes.
- [ ] I did not upgrade dependencies.
- [ ] I kept the current UI layout unless the task explicitly asked otherwise.
- [ ] If color/theme changes were requested, I only replaced colors via theme tokens.
- [ ] If requirements were ambiguous, I made the smallest assumption and continued.

## Files Changed
- List each changed file and why.

## How To Test
1. Pull this branch.
2. Run `npm install` (if needed).
3. Run `npm run start`.
4. Verify the feature/fix in the affected screen(s).
5. Confirm there are no unrelated behavior changes.

## Screenshots (optional but preferred)
- Add before/after screenshots for UI changes when relevant.
